creator: swills@FreeBSD.org
text: The latest version of the winrm-fs gem is 1.0.1. Are you sure you don't want to update to that version? If vagrant won't work with that one, we can always create a port for the 0.3.x version of winrm-fs. And we can test if vagrant works with the winrm-fs 1.0.1 by patching it, and add that to the vagrant port if so.
